pageContext.name: Aria - The Angel of Crystals
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya present the first statue to join the Museum of Mystical Melodies collection: Aria - The Angel of Crystals!  This original series builds a tale that expands with music, art, short stories, and statues.  With the refined facial features of an innocent maiden with sweet soft shimmering lips, Aria comes to life in this beautiful sculpt.  Her striking eyes emanate the complex feelings for one's beloved such as loneliness, happiness, and joy from being loved.  Feel the glowing radiance of this beautiful maiden by adding her to your collection!
